title: Provide service to customers
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide service to customers demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Acknowledge and greet customers

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Politely acknowledge customer on entering the workplace?
